title: Everyday and Sometimes
description: A slice-of-life experience modpack that never grows stale. With a constant stream of updates, you'll always find new adventures and challenges to enjoy. Build, farm, explore, and create as you shape your own unique world.
body:
Tired of the same old Minecraft routine? This modpack offers a refreshing change of pace. This ever-expanding slice-of-life pack keeps the fun going with regular updates. Experience a world where possibilities are endless.

  The purpose of this modpack is to create a relaxed and enjoyable gaming experience by incorporating additional features from mods. We prioritize keeping up-to-date with Minecraft's latest version to ensure players can benefit from both mod-enhanced and official vanilla content.

Download Server Modpack: [https://www.mediafire.com/folder/lxl73yd3mmtiq/Modpack](https://www.mediafire.com/folder/lxl73yd3mmtiq/Modpack)
